AccessMode.description: Property that impacts a resource's logging behavior and its connectivity with other resources and public networks.

values.name: enforced
values.description: Indicates that resource access is controlled by the NSP definition.

values.name: audit
values.description: Dry run mode, where traffic is evaluated against NSP Rules, logged but not enforced.

values.name: learning
values.description: Enables traffic evaluation to fall back to resource-specific firewall configurations.

AccessRuleDirection.description: Indicates direction of an access rule.

addressPrefixes.description: Address prefixes that are allowed access.

AgentConfiguration.description: Configurable properties that the user can set locally via the azcmagent config command, or remotely via ARM.

proxyUrl.description: Specifies the URL of the proxy to be used.

incomingConnectionsPorts.description: Specifies the list of ports that the agent will be able to listen on.

extensionsAllowList.description: Array of extensions that are allowed to be installed or updated.

extensionsBlockList.description: Array of extensions that are blocked (cannot be installed or updated)

proxyBypass.description: List of service names which should not use the specified proxy server.

extensionsEnabled.description: Specifies whether the extension service is enabled or disabled.

guestConfigurationEnabled.description: Specified whether the guest configuration service is enabled or disabled.

configMode.description: Name of configuration mode to use. Modes are pre-defined configurations of security controls, extension allowlists and guest configuration, maintained by Microsoft.

AgentConfigurationMode.description: Name of configuration mode to use. Modes are pre-defined configurations of security controls, extension allowlists and guest configuration, maintained by Microsoft.

enableAutomaticUpgrade.description: Specifies if the machine's agent should be upgraded

lastAttemptDesiredVersion.description: Specifies the version of the last attempt

lastAttemptStatus.description: Specifies the status of Agent Upgrade.

lastAttemptMessage.description: Failure message of last upgrade attempt if any.

downloadLink.description: Represents the download link of specific agent version.

publicNetworkAccess.description: Indicates whether machines associated with the private link scope can also use public Azure Arc service endpoints.

values.name: Enabled
values.description: Allows Azure Arc agents to communicate with Azure Arc services over both public (internet) and private endpoints.

values.name: Disabled
values.description: Does not allow Azure Arc agents to communicate with Azure Arc services over public (internet) endpoints. The agents must use the private link.

values.name: SecuredByPerimeter
values.description: Azure Arc agent communication with Azure Arc services over public (internet) is enforced by Network Security Perimeter (NSP)

provisioningState.description: Current state of this PrivateLinkScope: whether or not is has been provisioned within the resource group it is defined. Users cannot change this value but are able to read from it. Values will include Provisioning ,Succeeded, Canceled and Failed.

MachineExtensionProperties.description: Describes the properties of a Machine Extension.

forceUpdateTag.description: How the extension handler should be forced to update even if the extension configuration has not changed.

publisher.description: The name of the extension handler publisher.

type.description: Specifies the type of the extension; an example is "CustomScriptExtension".

typeHandlerVersion.description: Specifies the version of the script handler.

enableAutomaticUpgrade.description: Indicates whether the extension should be automatically upgraded by the platform if there is a newer version available.

autoUpgradeMinorVersion.description: Indicates whether the extension should use a newer minor version if one is available at deployment time. Once deployed, however, the extension will not upgrade minor versions unless redeployed, even with this property set to true.

settings.description: Json formatted public settings for the extension.

protectedSettings.description: The extension can contain either protectedSettings or protectedSettingsFromKeyVault or no protected settings at all.

provisioningState.description: The provisioning state, which only appears in the response.

MachineExtensionUpdateProperties.description: Describes the properties of a Machine Extension.

forceUpdateTag.description: How the extension handler should be forced to update even if the extension configuration has not changed.

publisher.description: The name of the extension handler publisher.

type.description: Specifies the type of the extension; an example is "CustomScriptExtension".

typeHandlerVersion.description: Specifies the version of the script handler.

enableAutomaticUpgrade.description: Indicates whether the extension should be automatically upgraded by the platform if there is a newer version available.

autoUpgradeMinorVersion.description: Indicates whether the extension should use a newer minor version if one is available at deployment time. Once deployed, however, the extension will not upgrade minor versions unless redeployed, even with this property set to true.

settings.description: Json formatted public settings for the extension.

protectedSettings.description: The extension can contain either protectedSettings or protectedSettingsFromKeyVault or no protected settings at all.

MachineExtensionUpgrade.description: Describes the Machine Extension Upgrade Properties.

MachineInstallPatchesParameters.description: Input for InstallPatches as directly received by the API

maximumDuration.description: Specifies the maximum amount of time that the operation will run. It must be an ISO 8601-compliant duration string such as PT4H (4 hours)

rebootSetting.description: Defines when it is acceptable to reboot a VM during a software update operation.

windowsParameters.description: Input for InstallPatches on a Windows VM, as directly received by the API

linuxParameters.description: Input for InstallPatches on a Linux VM, as directly received by the API

MachineInstallPatchesResult.description: The result summary of an installation operation.

status.description: The overall success or failure status of the operation. It remains "InProgress" until the operation completes. At that point it will become "Failed", "Succeeded", "Unknown" or "CompletedWithWarnings."

installationActivityId.description: The activity ID of the operation that produced this result.

rebootStatus.description: The reboot state of the VM following completion of the operation.

maintenanceWindowExceeded.description: Whether the operation ran out of time before it completed all its intended actions.

excludedPatchCount.description: The number of patches that were not installed due to the user blocking their installation.

notSelectedPatchCount.description: The number of patches that were detected as available for install, but did not meet the operation's criteria.

pendingPatchCount.description: The number of patches that were identified as meeting the installation criteria, but were not able to be installed. Typically this happens when maintenanceWindowExceeded == true.

installedPatchCount.description: The number of patches successfully installed.

failedPatchCount.description: The number of patches that could not be installed due to some issue. See errors for details.

startDateTime.description: The UTC timestamp when the operation began.

lastModifiedDateTime.description: The UTC timestamp when the operation finished.

startedBy.description: Indicates if operation was triggered by user or by platform.

patchServiceUsed.description: Specifies the patch service used for the operation.

osType.description: The operating system type of the machine.

errorDetails.description: The errors that were encountered during execution of the operation. The details array contains the list of them.

MachineListResult.description: The response of a Machine list operation.

value.description: The Machine items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

MachineProperties.description: Describes the properties of a hybrid machine.

locationData.description: Metadata pertaining to the geographic location of the resource.

agentConfiguration.description: Configurable properties that the user can set locally via the azcmagent config command, or remotely via ARM.

serviceStatuses.description: Statuses of dependent services that are reported back to ARM.

cloudMetadata.description: The metadata of the cloud environment (Azure/GCP/AWS/OCI...).

agentUpgrade.description: The info of the machine w.r.t Agent Upgrade

osProfile.description: Specifies the operating system settings for the hybrid machine.

licenseProfile.description: Specifies the License related properties for a machine.

provisioningState.description: The provisioning state, which only appears in the response.

status.description: The status of the hybrid machine agent.

lastStatusChange.description: The time of the last status change.

agentVersion.description: The hybrid machine agent full version.

vmId.description: Specifies the hybrid machine unique ID.

displayName.description: Specifies the hybrid machine display name.

clientPublicKey.description: Public Key that the client provides to be used during initial resource onboarding

identityKeyStore.description: Specifies the identity key store a machine is using.

tpmEkCertificate.description: Endorsement Key Certificate of the Trusted Platform Module (TPM) that the client provides to be used during initial resource onboarding.

osName.description: The Operating System running on the hybrid machine.

osVersion.description: The version of Operating System running on the hybrid machine.

vmUuid.description: Specifies the Arc Machine's unique SMBIOS ID

osSku.description: Specifies the Operating System product SKU.

osEdition.description: The edition of the Operating System.

adFqdn.description: Specifies the AD fully qualified display name.

dnsFqdn.description: Specifies the DNS fully qualified display name.

privateLinkScopeResourceId.description: The resource id of the private link scope this machine is assigned to, if any.

parentClusterResourceId.description: The resource id of the parent cluster (Azure HCI) this machine is assigned to, if any.

hardwareResourceId.description: Specifies the resource ID of the associated hardware device. Only settable by HCI RP.

mssqlDiscovered.description: Specifies whether any MS SQL instance is discovered on the machine.

networkProfile.description: Information about the network the machine is on.

MachineRunCommandInstanceView.description: The instance view of a machine run command.

executionMessage.description: Communicate script configuration errors or execution messages.

exitCode.description: Exit code returned from script execution.

MachineRunCommandListResult.description: The response of a MachineRunCommand list operation.

value.description: The MachineRunCommand items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

MachineRunCommandProperties.description: Describes the properties of a run command.

source.description: The source of the run command script.

parameters.description: The parameters used by the script.

protectedParameters.description: The parameters used by the script.

asyncExecution.description: Optional. If set to true, provisioning will complete as soon as script starts and will not wait for script to complete.

runAsUser.description: Specifies the user account on the machine when executing the run command.

runAsPassword.description: Specifies the user account password on the machine when executing the run command.

timeoutInSeconds.description: The timeout in seconds to execute the run command.

outputBlobUri.description: Specifies the Azure storage blob where script output stream will be uploaded. Use a SAS URI with read, append, create, write access OR use managed identity to provide the VM access to the blob. Refer outputBlobManagedIdentity parameter.

errorBlobUri.description: Specifies the Azure storage blob where script error stream will be uploaded. Use a SAS URI with read, append, create, write access OR use managed identity to provide the VM access to the blob. Refer errorBlobManagedIdentity parameter.

outputBlobManagedIdentity.description: User-assigned managed identity that has access to outputBlobUri storage blob. Use an empty object in case of system-assigned identity. Make sure managed identity has been given access to blob's container with 'Storage Blob Data Contributor' role assignment. In case of user-assigned identity, make sure you add it under VM's identity. For more info on managed identity and Run Command, refer https://aka.ms/ManagedIdentity and https://aka.ms/RunCommandManaged

errorBlobManagedIdentity.description: User-assigned managed identity that has access to errorBlobUri storage blob. Use an empty object in case of system-assigned identity. Make sure managed identity has been given access to blob's container with 'Storage Blob Data Contributor' role assignment. In case of user-assigned identity, make sure you add it under VM's identity. For more info on managed identity and Run Command, refer https://aka.ms/ManagedIdentity and https://aka.ms/RunCommandManaged

provisioningState.description: The provisioning state, which only appears in the response.

instanceView.description: The machine run command instance view.

MachineRunCommandScriptSource.description: Describes the script sources for run command. Use only one of script, scriptUri, commandId.

script.description: Specifies the script content to be executed on the machine.

scriptUri.description: Specifies the script download location. It can be either SAS URI of an Azure storage blob with read access or public URI.

commandId.description: Specifies the commandId of predefined built-in script.

scriptUriManagedIdentity.description: User-assigned managed identity that has access to scriptUri in case of Azure storage blob. Use an empty object in case of system-assigned identity. Make sure the Azure storage blob exists, and managed identity has been given access to blob's container with 'Storage Blob Data Reader' role assignment. In case of user-assigned identity, make sure you add it under VM's identity. For more info on managed identity and Run Command, refer https://aka.ms/ManagedIdentity and https://aka.ms/RunCommandManaged.

kind.description: Indicates which kind of Arc machine placement on-premises, such as HCI, SCVMM or VMware etc.

MachineUpdateProperties.description: Describes the ARM updatable properties of a hybrid machine.

locationData.description: Metadata pertaining to the geographic location of the resource.

osProfile.description: Specifies the operating system settings for the hybrid machine.

cloudMetadata.description: The metadata of the cloud environment (Azure/GCP/AWS/OCI...).

agentUpgrade.description: The info of the machine w.r.t Agent Upgrade

parentClusterResourceId.description: The resource id of the parent cluster (Azure HCI) this machine is assigned to, if any.

privateLinkScopeResourceId.description: The resource id of the private link scope this machine is assigned to, if any.

identityKeyStore.description: Identity key store type of the machine

tpmEkCertificate.description: Endorsement Key Certificate of the Trusted Platform Module (TPM) that the client provides to be used during initial resource onboarding.

macAddress.description: Represents MAC address of the network interface.

id.description: Represents the ID of the network interface.

name.description: Represents the name of the network interface.

ipAddresses.description: The list of IP addresses in this interface.

NetworkProfile.description: Describes the network information on this machine.

NetworkSecurityPerimeter.description: Properties that define a Network Security Perimeter resource.

perimeterGuid.description: Guid of the Network Security Perimeter

NetworkSecurityPerimeterConfigurationPro.description: Properties that define a Network Security Perimeter resource.

provisioningState.description: Current state of this NetworkSecurityPerimeter: whether or not is has been provisioned within the resource group it is defined. Users cannot change this value but are able to read from it. Values will include Provisioning ,Succeeded, Canceled and Failed.

networkSecurityPerimeter.description: The Network Security Perimeter associated with this configuration.

NetworkSecurityPerimeterConfigurationRec.description: Result of network security perimeter configurations.

location.description: The URL of the resource used to check the status of the asynchronous operation.

accessRules.description: Collection of access rules for the profile

enabledLogCategories.description: Collection of enabled log categories for the profile

OSProfile.description: Specifies the operating system settings for the hybrid machine.

computerName.description: Specifies the host OS name of the hybrid machine.

windowsConfiguration.description: Specifies the windows configuration for update management.

linuxConfiguration.description: Specifies the linux configuration for update management.

OSProfileLinuxConfiguration.description: Specifies the linux configuration for update management.

OSProfileWindowsConfiguration.description: Specifies the windows configuration for update management.

OsType.description: The operating system type of the machine.

PatchOperationStartedBy.description: Indicates if operation was triggered by user or by platform.

PatchOperationStatus.description: The overall success or failure status of the operation. It remains "InProgress" until the operation completes. At that point it will become "Unknown", "Failed", "Succeeded", or "CompletedWithWarnings."

PatchServiceUsed.description: Specifies the patch service used for the operation.

enableHotpatching.description: Captures the hotpatch capability enrollment intent of the customers, which enables customers to patch their Windows machines without requiring a reboot.

status.description: Status of the hotpatch capability enrollment or disenrollment.

PatchSettingsStatus.description: Status of the hotpatch capability enrollment or disenrollment.

hotpatchEnablementStatus.description: Indicates the current status of the hotpatch being enabled or disabled.

error.description: The errors that were encountered during the hotpatch capability enrollment or disenrollment.

PrivateEndpointConnectionDataModel.description: The Data Model for a Private Endpoint Connection associated with a Private Link Scope

id.description: The ARM Resource Id of the Private Endpoint.

name.description: The Name of the Private Endpoint.

PrivateEndpointConnectionProperties.description: Properties of a private endpoint connection.

privateEndpoint.description: Private endpoint which the connection belongs to.

privateLinkServiceConnectionState.description: Connection state of the private endpoint connection.

provisioningState.description: State of the private endpoint connection.

PrivateEndpointProperty.description: Private endpoint which the connection belongs to.

id.description: Resource id of the private endpoint.

PrivateLinkResourceListResult.description: The response of a PrivateLinkResource list operation.

value.description: The PrivateLinkResource items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

PrivateLinkResourceProperties.description: Properties of a private link resource.

groupId.description: The private link resource group id.

requiredMembers.description: The private link resource required member names.

requiredZoneNames.description: Required DNS zone names of the the private link resource.

publicNetworkAccess.description: Indicates whether machines associated with the private link scope can also use public Azure Arc service endpoints.

values.name: Enabled
values.description: Allows Azure Arc agents to communicate with Azure Arc services over both public (internet) and private endpoints.

values.name: Disabled
values.description: Does not allow Azure Arc agents to communicate with Azure Arc services over public (internet) endpoints. The agents must use the private link.

values.name: SecuredByPerimeter
values.description: Azure Arc agent communication with Azure Arc services over public (internet) is enforced by Network Security Perimeter (NSP)

connectionDetails.description: List of Private Endpoint Connection details.

PrivateLinkServiceConnectionStatePropert.description: State of the private endpoint connection.

status.description: The private link service connection status.

description.description: The private link service connection description.

actionsRequired.description: The actions required for private link service connection.

Processor.description: Describes the firmware of the machine

numberOfCores.description: The total number of physical cores on the processor.

subscriptionStatus.description: Indicates the current status of the product features.

enrollmentDate.description: The timestamp in UTC when the user enrolls the feature.

billingStartDate.description: The timestamp in UTC when the billing starts.

disenrollmentDate.description: The timestamp in UTC when the user disenrolled the feature.

billingEndDate.description: The timestamp in UTC when the billing ends.

error.description: The errors that were encountered during the feature enrollment or disenrollment.

subscriptionStatus.description: Indicates the new status of the product feature.

ProductProfileUpdateProperties.description: Describes the Update properties of a Product Profile.

subscriptionStatus.description: Indicates the subscription status of the product.

productType.description: Indicates the product type of the license.

productFeatures.description: The list of product feature updates.

ProgramYear.description: Describes the program year the volume license is for.

ProvisioningIssue.description: Details on issues that occurred during provisioning.

suggestedResourceIds.description: ARM Ids of the resources that can be associated to the same perimeter to remediate the issue

suggestedAccessRules.description: Access rules that can be added to the perimeter to remediate the issue

values.name: Warning
values.description: Warnings can cause connectivity issues after provisioning succeeds.

values.name: Error
values.description: Errors will cause association provisioning to fail.

ProvisioningState.description: The provisioning state, which only appears in the response.

ResourceAssociation.description: Properties that define a Resource Association.

RunCommandInputParameter.description: Describes the properties of a run command parameter.

RunCommandManagedIdentity.description: Contains clientId or objectId (use only one, not both) of a user-assigned managed identity that has access to storage blob used in Run Command. Use an empty RunCommandManagedIdentity object in case of system-assigned identity. Make sure the Azure storage blob exists in case of scriptUri, and managed identity has been given access to blob's container with 'Storage Blob Data Reader' role assignment with scriptUri blob and 'Storage Blob Data Contributor' for Append blobs(outputBlobUri, errorBlobUri). In case of user assigned identity, make sure you add it under VM's identity. For more info on managed identity and Run Command, refer https://aka.ms/ManagedIdentity and https://aka.ms/RunCommandManaged.

clientId.description: Client Id (GUID value) of the user-assigned managed identity. ObjectId should not be used if this is provided.

objectId.description: Object Id (GUID value) of the user-assigned managed identity. ClientId should not be used if this is provided.

ServiceExtension.description: Enable private link validation for an Azure Arc Extension

serviceExtensionType.description: The name of the Azure Arc Extension.

serviceExtensionPublicNetworkAccess.description: The network access policy to determine if the specified Azure Arc Extension can use public Azure Arc Extension service endpoints.

ServiceExtensionPublicNetworkAccess.description: The network access policy to determine if the specified Azure Arc Extension can use public Azure Arc Extension service endpoints.

values.name: enabled
values.description: Allows Azure Arc Extension agents to communicate with Azure Arc services over both public (internet) and private endpoints.

values.name: disabled
values.description: Does not allow Azure Arc Extension agents to communicate with Azure Arc services over public (internet) endpoints. The agents must use the private link.

ServiceStatus.description: Describes the status and behavior of a service.

status.description: The current status of the service.

startupType.description: The behavior of the service when the Arc-enabled machine starts up.

ServiceStatuses.description: Reports the state and behavior of dependent services.

extensionService.description: The state of the extension service on the Arc-enabled machine.

guestConfigurationService.description: The state of the guest configuration service on the Arc-enabled machine.

Settings.description: Concrete proxy resource types can be created by aliasing this type using a specific property type.

StatusTypes.description: The status of the hybrid machine agent.

StorageProfile.description: Describes the storage configuration of the machine

TagsResource.description: A container holding only the Tags for a resource, allowing the user to update the tags on a PrivateLinkScope instance.

VMGuestPatchRebootSetting.description: Defines when it is acceptable to reboot a VM during a software update operation.

VMGuestPatchRebootStatus.description: The reboot state of the VM following completion of the operation.

programYear.description: Describes the program year the volume license is for.

invoiceId.description: The invoice id for the volume license.

WindowsParameters.description: Input for InstallPatches on a Windows VM, as directly received by the API

classificationsToInclude.description: The update classifications to select when installing patches for Windows.

kbNumbersToInclude.description: Kbs to include in the patch operation

kbNumbersToExclude.description: Kbs to exclude in the patch operation

excludeKbsRequiringReboot.description: Filters out Kbs that don't have an InstallationRebootBehavior of 'NeverReboots' when this is set to true.

maxPatchPublishDate.description: This is used to install patches that were published on or before this given max published date.

patchNameMasksToInclude.description: This is used to include patches that match the given patch name masks. Alphanumeric strings and wildcard expressions consisting of * and ? are only supported as input values in the list. Null, empty and only whitespaces strings as inputs values are not supported.

patchNameMasksToExclude.description: This is used to exclude patches that match the given patch name masks. Alphanumeric strings and wildcard expressions consisting of * and ? are only supported as input values in the list. Null, empty and only whitespaces strings as inputs values are not supported.
